title: API Query Parameters
scenario: Write a prompt to generate API documentation for a GET request to the '/users' endpoint with query parameters 'name', 'email', and 'role'. Ensure the output includes example usage and a description of each parameter.
constraints: Must include example usage and parameter descriptions

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output adheres to the word count and formatting constraints.
Verify if the output includes example usage for the API request.
Evaluate if the output includes clear descriptions of each query parameter.
